description.value:
You know the best place to keep a firearm is out of sight, and you've adjusted your cheeks for maximum efficiency. It takes 10 minutes to safely prepare a one-handed gun and store it in your cheek pouch, and the gun can be up to 1 Bulk. As a single action, you can Interact to draw and Strike with the gun you stored in your mouth.

Special If you have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Big Mouth] ysoki feat, you can store a two-handed gun instead of a one-handed gun, and the gun you store can be up to 2 Bulk instead of the normal amount.
